_comment: Shared model catalog for toolchat — read by both scripts/download_model.py and the C++ app (catalog.cpp) so there is a single source of truth. 'dir'/'file' are relative to the models/ folder; 'repo' is the Hugging Face repo the file is fetched from.

models.name: Qwen3.5-4B
models.desc: RECOMMENDED — best tool calling (needs llama.cpp b9871+)

models.name: Qwen3.5-2B
models.desc: Lighter Qwen3.5 for weaker CPUs (needs llama.cpp b9871+)

models.name: Qwen3-4B
models.desc: Max accuracy (100% on the benchmark); works on any recent llama.cpp

models.name: Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct
models.desc: Fast, but over-eager (calls tools when it shouldn't)

models.name: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct
models.desc: Speed/accuracy sweet spot (90.5%, 4x faster than Qwen3-4B)

models.name: Gemma 4 E4B-it
models.desc: Google Gemma 4 (~4B), native function calling (needs llama.cpp b9871+)

models.name: Gemma 4 E2B-it
models.desc: Google Gemma 4 (~2B), smaller edge model (needs llama.cpp b9871+)

models.name: Gemma 3 4B-it
models.desc: Google Gemma 3 (4B), prior generation (prompt-based tool calling)

models.name: Gemma 3 1B-it
models.desc: Google Gemma 3 (1B), smallest prior-gen edge model
